column8: Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)
Angular Boulder, Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite with some brown, silty SAND and some red bricks and concrete fragment.

Moderately strong to strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely spaced and occasionally medium to closely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 40 degrees-50 degrees, 65 degrees-75 degrees.
